entries.label: Did the evaluation follow 72 hours of no precipitation?
Evaluation Criteria: If flow is observed, follow it to its source to determine if it is an allowable non-stormwater discharge.
Were any un-authorized non-stormwater discharges observed?
Describe remedial action to be taken
